title: AppSheet Scripts (Legacy Google Apps Script Automation Dump)
summary: Source-of-truth dump of legacy Google Apps Script automations (scheduler emails, payroll, schedule sheets, payroll comparison, quarterly reviews) intended as migration reference.
notes: Prose-light, code-heavy procedural reference with no frontmatter, no decision/consequences sections, no user stories, no API or schema contracts. Functions as descriptive legacy context for migration; not a SPEC because it does not define target system contracts (it documents existing GS behavior). Confidence high based on absence of ADR/PRD/SPEC signals and presence of pure reference content.
